title: Chatbot UI formatting for symptom guidance + doctor recommendation

requirements.summary: Render backend chatbot guidance text in a clean, readable multi-paragraph format and show an English fallback message for empty/error responses without exposing raw/debug output.
acceptanceCriteria: Chatbot responses that include multiple paragraphs/bullets remain readable in the chat UI (line breaks preserved).
If the backend returns an empty response or an error occurs, the UI shows a helpful fallback message in English (not raw error dumps).

file_operations.description: Add a small formatter that converts plain-text chatbot responses into readable JSX by preserving line breaks and presenting simple bullet-style lines (e.g., starting with '-', '*', or '•') as list items while keeping text strictly in English.

Update chatbot message rendering to use the new formatter for bot messages so multi-paragraph guidance and bullets are displayed cleanly; refine sanitizeBotResponse to avoid false positives (e.g., removing/relaxing length-based debug detection) while still suppressing JSON/debug-looking payloads; ensure empty-string responses always show a helpful English fallback message and never show raw error objects.
